# tfe_scim_group_mapping

Maps a SCIM group to a team in Terraform Enterprise. A team can be mapped to at most one SCIM group.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `scim_group_id` (String) The ID of the SCIM group to map to the team. Changing this forces a new mapping to be created, since the mapping API only supports updating the paused state.
- `team_id` (String) The ID of the team to map the SCIM group to. Changing this forces a new mapping to be created.

### Optional

- `paused` (Boolean) Whether provisioning for this mapping is paused. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the SCIM group mapping. Since a team can only be mapped to one SCIM group, this is the same as `team_id`.
